  "findings": [
    "Air separator installed in the wrong location relative to the system pump and boiler"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Relocate the air separator to the point of lowest solubility (typically on the suction side of the circulator pump, downstream of the boiler)"
  ],
  "rationale": "Hydronic standards and manufacturer manuals require the air separator to be installed where water temperature is highest and pressure is lowest (the suction side of the pump, immediately downstream of the boiler) to ensure proper air removal and prevent pump cavitation.",
  "references": [
    "Manufacturer Installation Manuals",
    "Hydronics Institute Standards",
    "ASHRAE Systems and Equipment Handbook"
  ]
}
